offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed tax deadlines cause penalties. We provide compliance tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking tax deadlines and regulatory changes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about compliance
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Join forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try deadline reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
